testcase.name: test_catalog_bodyweight_exercises_have_correct_weight_type

failure.message: AssertionError: Каталог упражнений НЕ содержит weight_type='bodyweight' для BW-упражнений — фикс backend `_ai_build_template` не сможет корректно определить bodyweight: plank: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight'); pull-up: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight'); dips: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight'); hanging-leg-raise: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight') assert not ["plank: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')", "pull-up: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')", "dips: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')", "hanging-leg-raise: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')"]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_gen_weight_type.py:55: in test_catalog_bodyweight_exercises_have_correct_weight_type assert not missing, ( E AssertionError: Каталог упражнений НЕ содержит weight_type='bodyweight' для BW-упражнений — фикс backend `_ai_build_template` не сможет корректно определить bodyweight: plank: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight'); pull-up: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight'); dips: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight'); hanging-leg-raise: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight') E assert not ["plank: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')", "pull-up: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')", "dips: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')", "hanging-leg-raise: weight_type=None (expected 'bodyweight')"]
